campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A recognised bachelor's degree or an equivalent professional qualification (with no work experience requirement); or a recognised diploma plus a minimum of four years of work experience.
requirements.work_experience: Not required for bachelor's degree holders; a minimum of four years of work experience required for applicants holding only a recognised diploma.
requirements.interview: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview, either in person or via teleconferencing.

program_name_en: Master of Science in Applied Economics
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A Bachelor's degree from a recognised university, or equivalent. A bachelor's degree in economics or related areas is not a pre-requisite, but applicants should have knowledge of microeconomics and macroeconomics, with some training in mathematics (especially calculus and linear algebra) and statistics.
requirements.prerequisites: Knowledge of microeconomics, macroeconomics, calculus, linear algebra and statistics.

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档数据】开放日期 2025-09-15；非本地申请截止 2026-06-04；本地申请截止 2026-07-24。选拔方式为"符合最低要求者逐案审核(case-by-case)"，官网未见明确round划分或"rolling"字样，rolling按官网未明确处理填false。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Data Analytics and Business Economics
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A Bachelor's degree from a recognised university, or equivalent, with satisfactory academic performance. Applicants should ideally possess an undergraduate degree either in business or in non-business fields with good quantitative training.
requirements.gpa_requirement: Satisfactory academic performance (no numeric GPA cut-off stated).
requirements.work_experience: Not mandatory; work experience proof submitted if applicable.
requirements.interview: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview and will sit for a written test (selected applicants invited to an online interview).

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档数据】开放日期 2025-09-15；非本地申请截止 2026-06-04；本地申请截止 2026-07-24。评审为逐案审核(case-by-case)，经Programme Management Committee筛选后推荐录取，官网未见明确round划分，rolling按官网未明确处理填false。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Entrepreneurship and Global Marketing
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A Bachelor's Degree or equivalent, or with a minimum of 180 ECTS credits, in any discipline from a recognised university or comparable institution. Designed for graduates from any discipline, regardless of nationality.
requirements.work_experience: Not mandatory; work experience proof submitted if applicable.
requirements.interview: Shortlisted applicants might be invited to attend an interview via online teleconference tool such as Zoom (not guaranteed for all applicants).

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档数据】开放日期 2025-09-15；最终截止 2026-07-24；ar.hkbu.edu.hk页面注明该项目入学为"Entry: January 2027"，与本学院其他9月入学项目周期不同；未见本地/非本地分段截止日期的明确区分，也未见local/non-local学费差异。官网未见round划分或"rolling"字样，rolling按官网未明确处理填false。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Finance (FinTech and Financial Analytics)
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong (WLB 804A, 8/F)

requirements.undergrad_background: A Bachelor degree with honours from a recognised university or comparable institution, or a professional qualification deemed to be equivalent. Applicants should possess basic training/experience in Finance, Mathematics or Computer Science, or complete preparatory courses.
requirements.gmat_gre: A satisfactory GMAT/GRE score is encouraged but not mandatory.
requirements.prerequisites: Basic training/experience in Finance, Mathematics or Computer Science, or completion of preparatory courses.
requirements.work_experience: For part-time study, preference given to applicants with a minimum of three years of relevant work experience (may be relaxed for highly qualified applicants).
requirements.interview: Qualified applicants will be required to attend an admission interview as part of the selection process.

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档数据】开放日期 2025-10-06；非本地申请截止 2026-06-04；本地申请截止 2026-07-24。未获取到分轮次(round)信息，官网也未出现"rolling"字样，rolling按官网未明确处理填false。

notes: 【上一届数据】官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry周期,此为2026 entry数据,仅供参考,须重新核对。原域名 mscfinance.hkbu.edu.hk 已301重定向至 mscfinance-fintech.hkbu.edu.hk；申请材料清单官网未列明，materials留空非编造。该项目明确要求所有合格申请者参加录取面试。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Applied Accounting and Finance
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A recognised bachelor's degree with honours in Business; or a bachelor's degree in other disciplines with relevant experience and/or training in Accounting, Finance, Management or related fields. Professional qualifications (CPA, ACCA, CFA, CMA) are also acceptable.
requirements.gmat_gre: GMAT not required, but applicants with a GMAT score or relevant working experience are preferred.
requirements.work_experience: Not mandatory, but preferred if available.
requirements.interview: Applicants should have a satisfactory performance in an admission interview.

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档轮次数据】Start 6 Oct 2025 → Round 1: 2026-02-28 → Round 2: 2026-04-30 → Round 3(Final): 2026-06-04(非本地)/2026-07-24(本地)。该项目官网明确按批次分轮截止，故rolling保留为true；2027 entry是否沿用同样的轮次结构须重新核对。

requirements.work_experience: Not mandatory; professional references recommended for applicants with work experience.
requirements.interview: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to attend an online interview.

program_name_en: Master of Science in AI for Business
campus: Shaw Campus, 34 Renfrew Road, Kowloon Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong

requirements.undergrad_background: A bachelor's degree in any discipline (business, engineering, social sciences, etc.). Non-STEM applicants must demonstrate quantitative skills and intermediate IT/IS or business knowledge through coursework or work experience.
requirements.prerequisites: Non-STEM applicants must demonstrate quantitative skills and intermediate IT/IS or business knowledge.
requirements.work_experience: Preferred but not mandatory; early-career professionals and career-changers encouraged to apply.
requirements.interview: Shortlisted candidates participate in a panel interview assessing problem-solving skills and ethical reasoning; interviews conducted if the Programme Board deems necessary.

deadlines.notes: 官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry申请周期，日期字段全部置null。【2026 entry存档数据】开放日期 2026-03-27(明显晚于同学院多数项目)；非本地申请截止 2026-06-15；本地申请截止 2026-07-24。官网注明"applications may close earlier if capacity is reached"(名额满可提前截止)，属于额满即止而非明确分轮批次，rolling暂填false并以此备注说明。

notes: 【上一届数据】官网截至2026-07-20尚未发布2027 entry周期,此为2026 entry数据,仅供参考,须重新核对。为近年新增项目，需要两封学术/专业推荐信；完整材料清单官网未列全，其余材料留空非编造。因存在"额满提前截止"条款，内地申请者应尽早提交。
